svg.title: ConflictSense system architecture
svg.desc: 7 enterprise policy documents feed into Azure Foundry IQ, which grounds all five agents: DocumentAnalyzer, ConflictDetector, ImpactAssessor, RiskQuantifier, ResolutionRecommender. Output passes through a Human Approval Gate before becoming the Resolution Roadmap.

g.text: IT Security · HR Remote Work · Data Governance · Employee Handbook · Whistleblower · Finance · DPDP ★
Azure Foundry IQ — grounded multi-source retrieval · per-document citations · auditable output
Human Approval Gate — no finding exits without review
